---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Fraunces:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
---

```{=html}
<a class="skip-link" href="#main">Skip to content</a>
<header class="site-header">
  <div class="header-inner">
    <a href="#" class="logo">Antara Sudhir</a>
    <button type="button" class="nav-toggle" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="site-nav" aria-label="Open menu">
      <span class="nav-toggle-bar"></span>
    </button>
    <nav id="site-nav" class="site-nav" aria-label="Primary">
      <ul>
        <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
        <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
        <li><a href="#education">Education</a></li>
        <li><a href="#credentials">Credentials</a></li>
        <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
        <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
        <li>
          <a href="files/Resume_Antara_Sudhir.pdf"
             target="_blank"
             rel="noopener noreferrer">
             Resume
          </a>
        </li>
        <li><a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Contact</a></li>
      </ul>
    </nav>
  </div>
</header>

<main id="main">
  <section class="hero" aria-labelledby="hero-heading">
    <div class="hero-bg" aria-hidden="true"></div>
    <div class="container hero-inner">
      <p class="hero-eyebrow">Antara Sudhir · MS in Applied Business Analytics</p>
      <h1 id="hero-heading" class="hero-title">
        <span>Data In.</span><br>
        <span>Direction Out.</span>
      </h1>
      <p class="hero-lead">
        Applied Business Analytics student with hands-on experience across the full analytics pipeline.
        Experienced in transforming raw, complex data into insights that actually drive business
        decisions - not just reports that get filed away.
      </p>
      <div class="hero-actions">
        <a href="#experience" class="btn btn-primary">View Experience</a>
      
        <a href="files/Resume_Antara_Sudhir.pdf"
           class="btn btn-ghost"
           target="_blank"
           rel="noopener noreferrer">
           Download Resume
        </a>

        <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-ghost">Get in Touch</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="about" class="section">
    <div class="container narrow">
      <h2 class="section-title">About Me</h2>
      <p class="section-intro">
        I work at the intersection of data engineering and analytics - building pipelines that run reliably and dashboards that stakeholders actually trust.
        Over the past two years, I've built production systems in Microsoft Fabric: Medallion architectures, automated ETL with Python and SQL, and
        Power BI reporting that non-technical teams can act on without questioning the numbers.
      </p>
      <p>
        At iLink Digital, I delivered end-to-end client solutions across the full data lifecycle - migrating 40+ SQL Server objects into Fabric,
        translating business requirements into technical specs, and keeping every deliverable on schedule.
      </p>
      <p>
        I'm now pursuing an M.S. in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University, where I'm focused on one thing: making technical depth
        legible to the people who need to act on it.
      </p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="experience" class="section section-alt">
    <div class="container">
      <h2 class="section-title">Experience</h2>
      <ul class="timeline">
        <li class="timeline-item">
          <div class="timeline-marker" aria-hidden="true"></div>
          <div class="timeline-content card">
            <span class="card-dates">Apr 2025 — Nov 2025</span>
            <h3 class="card-title">Software Engineer</h3>
            <p class="card-subtitle">iLink Digital</p>
            <ul class="bullet-list">
              <li>Recreated 40+ SQL Server stored procedures and scalar functions in Microsoft Fabric Warehouse, cutting migration time from 5+ weeks to 2 weeks.</li>
              <li>Migrated and consolidated 80+ data sources into structured, reporting-ready tables within Microsoft Fabric.</li>
              <li>Implemented a 3 layer Medallion architecture enabling delivery of 40+ client-facing reports with improved data quality.</li>
              <li>Partnered with clients and 2 cross-functional teams to gather requirements and deliver accurate reporting solutions.</li>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </li>
        <li class="timeline-item">
          <div class="timeline-marker" aria-hidden="true"></div>
          <div class="timeline-content card">
            <span class="card-dates">Feb 2024 — Mar 2025</span>
            <h3 class="card-title">Software Engineer Trainee</h3>
            <p class="card-subtitle">iLink Digital</p>
            <ul class="bullet-list">
              <li>Recognized with the iLink Digital Award - Rising Star for delivering high-quality data solutions.</li>
              <li>Migrated and consolidated 60+ data sources into structured, reporting-ready tables within Microsoft Fabric.</li>
              <li>Implemented a 3-layer Medallion architecture supporting delivery of 40+ reports in Phase 1 and 60+ in Phase 2.</li>
              <li>Designed and automated a quarterly data collection pipeline generating 90+ Excel templates annually across 7 business units.</li>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </li>
        <li class="timeline-item">
          <div class="timeline-marker" aria-hidden="true"></div>
          <div class="timeline-content card">
            <span class="card-dates">Oct 2023 — Jan 2024</span>
            <h3 class="card-title">Data Intern</h3>
            <p class="card-subtitle">iLink Digital</p>
            <ul class="bullet-list">
              <li>Supported 3 senior analysts with data preparation, validation, and execution of data analysis workflows.</li>
              <li>Independently designed wireframes in Figma and developed 2 client-ready dashboards in Microsoft Fabric.</li>
              <li>Applied Databricks, Python, SQL, Azure, Snowflake, Microsoft Fabric and Power BI across real-world analytics projects.</li>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="education" class="section">
    <div class="container">
      <h2 class="section-title">Education</h2>
      <div class="edu-grid">
        <article class="card card-edu">
          <div class="card-edu-meta">
            <span class="badge">In progress</span>
            <span class="card-dates">Jan 2026 — May 2028</span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="card-title">Boston University</h3>
          <p class="card-subtitle">Master of Science, Applied Business Analytics</p>
          <p class="card-body">Graduate study focused on analytics, machine learning and data-driven decision making in business contexts.</p>
        </article>
        <article class="card card-edu">
          <div class="card-edu-meta">
            <span class="badge badge-muted">Completed</span>
            <span class="card-dates">Aug 2020 — Jul 2023</span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="card-title">University of London · Singapore Institute of Management</h3>
          <p class="card-subtitle">Bachelor of Science (Honors), Economics and Management</p>
        </article>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="credentials" class="section section-alt">
    <div class="container">
      <h2 class="section-title">Certifications &amp; Awards</h2>
      <div class="credentials-grid">
        <div class="credential-block">
          <h3 class="skill-group-title">Certifications</h3>
          <ul class="credential-list">
            <li>Microsoft Certified: Power BI Data Analyst Associate</li>
            <li>Databricks Certified Data Engineer Associate</li>
            <li>Microsoft Certified: Fabric Analytics Engineer Associate</li>
            <li>Generative AI Fundamentals — Databricks Academy Accreditation</li>
            <li>Databricks Lakehouse Fundamentals — Databricks Academy Accreditation</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="credential-block">
          <h3 class="skill-group-title">Awards</h3>
          <ul class="award-list">
            <li>
              <strong>Winner</strong> — 12th ABA@BU Hackathon · Boston University
              <span class="award-date">Mar 2026</span>
            </li>
            <li>
              <strong>Rising Star Award</strong> · iLink Digital
              <span class="award-date">Aug 2025</span>
            </li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="projects" class="section">
    <div class="container">
      <h2 class="section-title">Projects</h2>
      <div class="project-grid">
        <article class="project-card project-card-featured">
          <div class="project-card-top">
            <span class="project-tag">Hackathon · Winner</span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="project-title">ABA@BU — Intertemporal choice &amp; subscription strategy</h3>
          <p class="project-desc">Built a reproducible analytics pipeline on a large-scale intertemporal-choice dataset (800k+ trials), with EDA, feature engineering, and predictive models (logistic regression, random forest, XGBoost). Tied findings to subscription-tier pricing and presented live per the hackathon brief.</p>
          <div class="project-links project-links-row">
            <a href="https://github.com/antarasudhir/ABA-Hackathon-2026/tree/main" class="link-arrow" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">GitHub repository</a>
            <a href="https://apoorvverma.github.io/coding-rookie/" class="link-arrow" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Project site</a>
          </div>
        </article>
        <article class="project-card">
          <div class="project-card-top">
            <span class="project-tag">Python Visualizations</span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="project-title">Sports League Database Analysis</h3>
          <p class="project-desc">Built a shared 4-function ETL pipeline connecting to a cloud-hosted SQLite database and produced 7 interactive Plotly visualizations exploring what drives team success. Deployed as a live Streamlit app.</p>
          <div class="project-links project-links-row">
            <a href="https://github.com/antarasudhir/Sports-League-Database-Analysis" class="link-arrow" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">GitHub repository</a>
          </div>
        </article>
        <article class="project-card">
          <div class="project-card-top">
            <span class="project-tag">Machine Learning</span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="project-title">Customer Churn Prediction</h3>
          <p class="project-desc">Built a logistic regression model achieving 0.88 precision on churn prediction and AUC-ROC of 0.766. Designed the full ETL pipeline and surfaced actionable retention insights.</p>
          <div class="project-links project-links-row">
            <a href="https://github.com/antarasudhir/Customer-Churn-Prediction" class="link-arrow" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">GitHub repository</a>
          </div>
        </article>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="skills" class="section section-alt">
    <div class="container">
      <h2 class="section-title">Technical Skills</h2>
      <div class="skills-wrap">
        <div class="skill-group">
          <h3 class="skill-group-title">Languages</h3>
          <ul class="skill-tags">
            <li>Python</li><li>SQL</li><li>R</li><li>PySpark</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="skill-group">
          <h3 class="skill-group-title">Data Engineering</h3>
          <ul class="skill-tags">
            <li>Microsoft Fabric</li><li>Databricks</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="skill-group">
          <h3 class="skill-group-title">Visualization</h3>
          <ul class="skill-tags">
            <li>Power BI</li><li>Microsoft Excel</li><li>Figma</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="skill-group">
          <h3 class="skill-group-title">Workflow</h3>
          <ul class="skill-tags">
            <li>Jira</li><li>VS Code</li><li>GitHub</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="contact" class="section section-contact">
    <div class="container narrow">
      <h2 class="section-title">Contact</h2>
      <p class="section-intro">Open to roles in analytics, data engineering, and BI.</p>
      <ul class="contact-list">
        <li><a href="mailto:antara.sudhir@gmail.com" class="contact-link">antara.sudhir@gmail.com</a></li>
        <li><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/antarasudhir" class="contact-link" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">LinkedIn</a></li>
        <li><a href="https://github.com/sudhir-antara" class="contact-link" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">GitHub</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </section>
</main>

<footer class="site-footer">
  <div class="container footer-inner">
    <p>&copy; 2026 Antara Sudhir</p>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
const header = document.querySelector('.site-header');
const toggle = document.querySelector('.nav-toggle');
if (toggle) {
  toggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const expanded = toggle.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';
    toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(!expanded));
    header.classList.toggle('nav-open');
  });
}
</script>
```
